name: monitoring-agent
description: Specialist agent for per-test-run observability data extraction in the PerfPilot Agents framework. Owns Datadog metric, trace, and log extraction scoped to a test run's time window: host metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network), Kubernetes pod/node metrics, APM service traces (latency, error rates, throughput), and application log queries. Uses environment-specific host and service definitions from datadog-mcp/environments.json and optional custom queries from datadog-mcp/custom_queries.json. Extracted data feeds the analysis-agent's SLA validation, bottleneck attribution, and the reporting-agent's infrastructure sections. Currently in development (F3.9 stub); tools will be wired in F3.10.

data_sources.host_metrics: CPU, memory, disk I/O, network throughput per host
data_sources.application_logs: Error and warning log queries scoped to the test window
